title: Circular Blocks
description: Adds circular shapes into your favorite block game.
body:
# Circular Blocks

Minecraft mod that adds a collection of interesting circular shapes into your favorite block game.
![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vFFXUcKH/images/2711f95c0b0e188fa96c664c21bf62c0cbda424d.png)
**Circular Shapes Available**:
- Cylinders (1x1, 2x2, 3x3)
- Quarter Cylinders (1x1 only)
- Angled Pipes (1x1, 1x2, 1x3, 1x4, 1x5, and rotated variants)
- ...And more to come!


Please note that the lighting on quarter cylinders may not match vanilla's lighting when vanilla and quarter cylinders are placed next to each other.

Blocks and items don't have proper names or translations at the moment.

This is a proof of concept. As of 0.2.0, every solid block can be made into a cylinder.
